subject: Local Tomcat redeploy path
fact: In the current Homebrew Tomcat validation setup for this repo, the active app deploy path is `/opt/homebrew/opt/tomcat@10/libexec/webapps/event-flow.war`, and forcing a fresh runtime redeploy may require replacing that WAR plus clearing `/opt/homebrew/opt/tomcat@10/libexec/webapps/event-flow` and `/opt/homebrew/opt/tomcat@10/libexec/work/Catalina/localhost/event-flow` before the new servlet routes become visible.
reason: Future backend phases in this repository are likely to repeat Tomcat smoke validation, and stale exploded deployments can make new routes appear missing even after a successful build.
